texto: I had come to the canyon with expectations. I wanted to see snowy egrets flying against the black schist at dusk
autor: I saw blue-winged teal against the green waters at dawn. I had wanted to hear thunder rolling in the thousand-foot depths
explicacao: Citação de I saw blue-winged teal against the green waters at dawn. I had wanted to hear thunder rolling in the thousand-foot depths sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I had come to the canyon with expectations.
